main.summary: Represents the execution state of an Activity, derived from Task status and ActivityRecord.

field.name: None
field.summary: No task or record is available for this Activity.

field.name: Completed
field.summary: The Activity's task completed successfully but no explicit ActivityRecord was set.

field.name: CompletedFreeMode
field.summary: The Activity ran in free mode and has completed with a final record.

field.name: Running
field.summary: The Activity's task is currently running and no final record has been set.

field.name: RunningFreeMode
field.summary: The Activity is running in free mode without a final record.

field.name: Canceled
field.summary: The Activity was canceled and the task is no longer running.

field.name: CanceledRunning
field.summary: The Activity was canceled, but the task continues to run.

field.name: TimedOut
field.summary: The Activity timed out and the task is no longer running.

field.name: TimedOutRunning
field.summary: The Activity timed out, but the task continues to run.

field.name: Faulted
field.summary: The Activity's task faulted or the ActivityRecord indicates a failure.
